This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"raiseDispute(bytes32,string)":{"details":"Gas optimized with custom errors"},"refundSwap(bytes32)":{"details":"Gas optimized with custom errors"},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. approveSwap(bytes32).details: Gas optimized with custom errors and unchecked increment

returns.hasRiskProof: Whether any risk proof is valid
returns.maxAllowedTier: Maximum tier this address qualifies for

initiateSwap(address,bytes32,uint256,uin.details: Gas optimized with custom errors. Uses nonReentrant guard. Note: _determineStatus calls external policyEngine.validateTransaction but this is safe because: 1) nonReentrant prevents reentrancy, 2) validateTransaction is a view-like call that doesn't modify external state, 3) swapId is unique and checked for non-existence before the call.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._enabled: Whether to require zkNAF verification for transfers
params._zkNAFModule: Address of AMTTPCoreZkNAF contract (or address(0) to disable)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeTo(address).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

approveSwap(bytes32).notice: Approve a pending swap (for high-risk transactions)

getZkNAFStatus(address).notice: Get zkNAF compliance status for an address

initiateSwap(address,bytes32,uint256,uin.notice: Initiate ETH swap with risk score and oracle signature

raiseDispute(bytes32,string).notice: Raise dispute for a swap (requires Kleros arbitration fee)
